claudeMd:
# Task: Curved Downhill Track with Finish Line

Replace the straight flat track with a winding, downhill CatmullRom curve. Add a finish line, run timer, and curve-following camera/physics.

## Codebase

Pure static HTML+JS served by nginx. No npm, no build step. Three.js v0.183.2 via CDN importmap.

- `index.html` — Main page with Three.js importmap, overlay UI, and all CSS
- `js/main.js` — Game loop and state management
- `js/physics.js` — Ball physics in curve-local coordinates
- `js/renderer.js` — Three.js scene, curved track mesh, level generation
- `js/tracker.js` — MediaPipe head tilt detection with calibration
- `Dockerfile` + `nginx.conf` — Docker build serving on port 8080

checks: Ball rolls along a curved, downhill path instead of a straight flat track
Finish line is visible at the end of the course with checkerboard pattern and banner
Timer counts up during gameplay and displays elapsed time on course completion
Camera follows ball smoothly along the curve tangent
Obstacles, coins, and turtle powerup are placed along the curved track
After a game-over and restart, the game still functions correctly
